sourceSystem.name: I2(5)
sourceSystem.description: Dihedral Coxeter group with m=5. The full group has 10 elements.
notes: Toy source system embedded in the quotient/game workflow demo.
Identity subgroup request for the quotient/game golden workflow. The resulting quotient has one vertex for each element of I2(5).
The demo cocycle labels s0 by +1 and s1 by -1.
